summary: Phase phase-01 UAT Review: NO-GO. While the core functionality of seed, init, and status is implemented, several requirements are missed. 1) US-003: 'gwrk plan status' does not display 'sp_actual', failing an acceptance scenario. 2) FR-017: 'gwrk plan init' does not print individual skip warnings for existing nodes. 3) T008: Automated CLI integration tests are verified as hollow and broken, as noted in previous reviews. Implementation tasks T001-T004, T006-T007 remain completed, but T005 is re-opened for CLI output remediation and T008 remains open for test fixing.
